inputs.titre: Fondation du Trinity College de Dublin

reason: The image depicts the construction of a stone building, seemingly during the Renaissance period. The tools and construction techniques shown are plausible for the time. However, the clothing of the workers, while generally appropriate, lacks some of the detail and specific cuts that would be expected in 1592.  The lack of overt anachronisms is a plus, but the overall slightly 'modern' feel of the clothing and the very clean-cut appearance of the workers (especially their beards) lower the score. Also, it is unlikely that all the stone blocks would be perfectly rectangular.
